description: A customer calls to complain that they felt pressured and misled by a salesperson during their visit.

nodes.task_description: Listen to the customer's full complaint without interruption and express empathy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent allows the customer to voice their concerns fully.

nodes.task_description: Gather details about the incident, including the date of the visit and the salesperson's name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all relevant details of the incident.

nodes.task_description: Apologize on behalf of the dealership, log the complaint, and assure the customer that the sales manager will investigate and contact them directly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully de-escalates the situation and creates a formal complaint ticket for the manager.
